pattern: Maintain 26 stacks (one per letter); when a star is encountered, pop the most recently added character from the lexicographically smallest non-empty stack, marking both positions as removed.
hints: Each '*' must delete itself and the smallest character to its left; track character positions in 26 separate stacks.
When processing a '*', scan from 'a' upward to find the first non-empty stack and pop the top index from it.
At the end, collect all indices that were not popped and not stars, sort them, and join the characters.

edge_inputs.description: star deletes optimal 'a' to leave lexicographically smallest
star preceded only by larger characters
multiple stars each deleting the smallest available
star should prefer earlier occurrence of smallest char
star removes 'a' even when later 'b' is adjacent

stress.description: random string with lowercase letters and guaranteed-deletable stars
